name: Allen Recreational Park
description: Come play pickleball at Allen Recreational Park in Wildwood Crest, NJ! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Avalon Community Hall
description: Indoor pickleball in Avalon is closed for the season.  A new scheudle for indoor play will be released in October 2024 - March 2025.  April 2024-September 2024 only outdoor pickleball is available in Avalon.

name: Crest Pier Recreation Center
description: Crest Pier Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Wildwood Crest, NJ. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Dink iT Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Dink iT Pickleball in Middle Township, NJ! There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Goshen Sports Complex
description: Goshen Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Cape May Court House, NJ. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Grace O'Brien Park
description: Grace O'Brien Park is a place to play pickleball in Avalon, NJ. There are 18 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: No play allowed before 8am, courts open until dusk.
hours: Thursday 8am-Noon Intermediate: Bank A, Courts 1-10 Advanced: Bank B, Courts 11-18 Wednesday 8am

name: Lower Township Recreation Dept
description:
Lower Township Residents only

Courts only on specific times posted by Rec center

name: Martin Luther Recreation Center
description: Martin Luther Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Middle Township, NJ. There are 4 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Ocean City Tennis Court on 18th Street
description: Ocean City Tennis Court on 18th Street is a place to play pickleball in Ocean City, NJ. There are 16 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: If you are not seasonal member only allowed to play 1-7pm.
fees: Fee required — $5 daily fee; $60 seasonal membership fee

name: Railroad Avenue Park
description: Railroad Avenue Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Middle Township, NJ. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Daily play usually starts by 7:30 am. See TeamReach code WCMPB to schedule play.

name: Sea Isle City Pickleball Courts
description: Sea Isle City Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sea Isle City, NJ. There are 7 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.
hours: Monday-Friday: 9am-4pm, Saturday: 10am-3pm Beach Tag Office : 609-263-8687 Ext. 6 (April through September 1st) Public Relations Office: (609) 263-8687 Ext. 3 Tourism Office: 609-263-8687 Ext. 1 or Ext. 4 Sea Isle City Tourism Office & Welcome Center

name: Stone Harbor Pickleball Courts
description: Stone Harbor Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stone Harbor, NJ. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Upper Community Center
description: Upper Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodbine, NJ. There are 2 indoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Wildwood Crest Pickleball Courts
description: There are 8 courts with permanent nets and lines. Two of the four remaining tennis courts have lines but use portable nets. The image of the courts is old. The four tennis courts on the lower right of the picture have all been converted to permanent pickleball courts with fencing.
